description: Sweet, summery and stylish, teen-wear doesn't get any better than enroute's footwear for teenage divas! Floral pattern at the toe holder with a girly pink colour adds a sweet twist to this pair. Upper Leather thong style straps with a floral detail on the toe separator Ankle strap looping behind the ankle and attached to the thong straps with a buckle detail Padded footbed Outsole TPU textured outsole with a heel patch Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
